title: Diagram Page Not Receiving Data for Specific User
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the diagram page to display data after selecting objects, so that I can view my entity relationships without troubleshooting.
description:
## Bug
The diagram page was not receiving any data when logged in as a specific user. The page appeared blank with no ERD content.

## Root Cause
User error — the user had not drilled into each object.php to ensure field data was loaded into the database. Without field data, the ERD had nothing to render.

## Resolution
Closed as user error. Enhancement tickets MBT-161 and MBT-162 were created to improve the user flow so this confusion is avoided in the future.
acceptance_criteria: Diagram page displays data when objects have been properly loaded
Clear indication is provided if objects have not yet been synced
implementation_notes: Root cause was user error — objects were selected but field data was not synced. Led to enhancement tickets for better UX guidance.
comment_summary: Developer requested login details to reproduce. Reporter identified it as user error and created enhancement tickets MBT-161 and MBT-162 to improve the workflow.
